demo.title: generate.sh
demo.code:
# Dry-run first — needs no key, spends nothing, prints the exact Replicate request
node generate.mjs --prompt "a foggy neon city at dusk, cinematic" --model flux --aspect landscape --dry-run

# Live generation — bring your own Replicate key (billed to your account)
REPLICATE_API_TOKEN=r8_xxx node generate.mjs \
  --prompt "a foggy neon city at dusk, cinematic" \
  --model flux --aspect landscape --out out/city.webp

setup: Node 18+ — uses built-in fetch, zero dependencies (no npm install)
Bring your own Replicate API token: export REPLICATE_API_TOKEN (get one at https://replicate.com/account/api-tokens). Generation is billed to your Replicate account, not MythosForge.
Verify with `--dry-run` (needs no key) before any live run
